title: Durable Gold
description: Gold equipment has increased durability, making it worth its effort!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# 🥇 Durable Gold
- **Increased durability** of Golden Tools to 510
- **Increased durability** of Golden Armour to be the same as Chainmail _(195, 105, 240, 165)_
